mission.title: perses: [FEATURE] Dashboard: add panel group repeat based on a variable
mission.description: # Description Add panel group repeat based on variable. Every panel group or panel are linked to the definition of repeated definition, so if you edit a panel, it will spread change to all repeated panel group + panels. Closes https://github.com/perses/perses/issues/2937. # Screenshots Overview: Edit on blackbox repeated panel group: Focus/zoom on caddy panel: Editing repeated variable: _Make me think I need to do a select with variable available, it will

resolution.summary: Changes to providers order may have more impact than expected, still looking at it 🥲
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
